mnemonics: CLAP: Convolution, Leaky ReLU, Average Pooling, Pooling
keyPoints: Convolutional Layers extract features using filters
Pooling Layers reduce spatial dimensions and computation
Fully Connected Layers at the end perform classification
commonMistakes: Using filters that are too large (start with 3x3 or 5x5)
Not using padding to preserve spatial dimensions
Forgetting to add non-linearity (ReLU) after convolution
